name: cloud-risk-triage-agent
description: Autonomous cloud security posture sweep for Tenable Cloud Security. Four sections: Address critical findings (root MFA, third-party sensitive-data access, public exposure, exposed secrets), Address low-hanging fruits (inactive identities, unused credentials, unused security groups), Discover AI risk (AI asset inventory + model-to-training-data correlation), and Toxic combination (public + critical-VPR-vuln + privileged workloads). Writes a SOC-ready report; always lists every check.
